results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√2. rudh P. Ā. -ruṇaddhi, -runddhe, to stop completely, detain, obstruct, check, confine,  ŚBr.  &c. &c.;
to block up (a road),  MBh. ;
to invest, besiege,  Hariv. ;  R.  &c.;
to shut up (the mind from external objects),  MBh. ;
to keep off, avert, impede, prevent,  ib. ;
to withhold, refuse,  ib.  :
Caus. -rodhayati (only ind.p. -rodhya), to cause to stop, obstruct,  Rājat.

results.rendered_html:
saṃrudh 7 U.
1 To obstruct, detain, stop; sa cettu pātha saṃruddhaḥ paśabhirvā rathena vā  Ms. 8. 295. 
2 To impede, obstruct, prevent; rāṃruddhaceṣṭasya  R. 2. 43. 
3 To hold fast, enchain; tṛṇamiva laghu lakṣmīrnaiva tān saṃruṇaddhi  Bh. 2. 17. 
4 To seize upon, grasp, catch hold of;  Ms. 8. 235. 
5 To besiege, blockade, invest.
6 To cover up, conceal.
7 To withhold, refuse.
